name: Le Roy
description_short: LeRoy Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, non-profit credit union federally chartered in 1958, serving the LeRoy, NY community with savings, loans, and digital banking services.
description_long:
LeRoy Federal Credit Union was established in 1958 as L-M Employees Federal Credit Union to serve employees of LeRoy Machine Company and their families. Following economic challenges in the early 1980s, the credit union obtained a community charter in 1983 to expand membership eligibility and ensure long-term stability. Today, it operates as a cooperative financial institution owned and controlled by its members, who share equally in the organization's profits through dividends and favorable loan rates.

The credit union offers core banking services including savings accounts, loan products (with published rate information available online), checking accounts, debit cards, and investment services. Members can access their accounts through iBanking online services and a newly launched mobile banking app with remote deposit capture capabilities. The institution also provides loan calculators, account fee information, and a 24/7 lost or stolen debit card hotline.

As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, LeRoy distinguishes itself through its non-profit, member-owned structure where all operational income after expenses returns to members. The organization has received grants from the NY Credit Union Association to upgrade technology infrastructure, including migration to Exchange Online email services. Its membership eligibility extends to anyone living, working, or attending school in LeRoy, NY, plus their extended family members, making it accessible beyond original employer limitations.

The primary limitation is geographic restriction—membership is limited to those with LeRoy, NY connections. The website content focuses on core banking services without detailed information about competitive rates, specialized loan products, or comprehensive service offerings. A notable security alert regarding counterfeit check scams suggests members should remain vigilant, though this reflects external fraud rather than institutional shortcomings. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal loans with published rate information
iBanking online account access and management
Mobile banking app with remote deposit capture
Member discounts through Love My Credit Union partner benefits
New Exchange Online email services for members
pros: Member-owned, non-profit cooperative structure returns all profits to members through dividends and competitive loan rates
Newly launched mobile banking app includes remote deposit capture for convenience
Low minimum membership requirement of $10.00 to join
Expanded membership eligibility includes anyone living, working, or attending school in LeRoy plus extended family
24/7 lost or stolen debit card support line (1-866-316-2131)
Received NY Credit Union Association grant to upgrade technology infrastructure and email services
Members receive exclusive discounts and benefits through Love My Credit Union partner network
cons: Membership strictly limited to those with LeRoy, NY geographic connections or family relationships to eligible members
Website provides minimal detail on loan rates, APRs, or competitive rate information—rates must be viewed or calculated separately
Limited information about full range of services, products, and specialized offerings compared to larger financial institutions
Single physical location may limit accessibility for members in surrounding areas
No mention of alternative membership access methods beyond in-person visit to main office
best_for: LeRoy, NY residents and employees seeking member-owned banking with community focus
Local families who value non-profit, cooperative financial institutions with low-cost operations
People with existing family connections to LeRoy FCU members seeking to expand household accounts
diagnosis: LeRoy Federal Credit Union is best suited for residents and employees in the LeRoy, NY area who value member-owned, non-profit banking with personal service and competitive rates. The primary caveat is strict geographic membership eligibility—this institution is not accessible to those outside the LeRoy community unless they have family connections to existing members.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: LeRoy Federal Credit Union serves the LeRoy, NY community with savings, loans, and digital banking services.
